name: RODE VideoMicro II Ultracompact Camera-Mount Shotgun Microphone for Cameras and Smartphones
description: Ideal for run-and-gun video creators and live streamers, the Rode VideoMicro II is an ultracompact and lightweight camera-mount shotgun microphone for recording high-quality audio with a DSLR/mirrorless camera or iOS/Android mobile device.

features.Key Features :: Run & Gun Video Creators, Live Streamers | Clear Sound for Cameras and Smartphones | Simple Plug & Go Operation | HELIX Isolation Mount System | High-Quality Foam and Furry Windshields | 3.5mm TRS Output Connector | 3.5mm TRS to TRS & TRS to TRRS Cables | No Battery Required | Made in Sydney, Australia
features.What's in The Box :: RODE VideoMicro II Ultracompact Camera-Mount Shotgun Microphone for Cameras and Smartphones | Helix Isolation Mount | Foam Windshield | RODE WS12 Deluxe Windshield for VideoMic GO II | RODE SC7 3.5mm Right-Angle TRS to 3.5mm Right-Angle TRRS Coiled Adapter Cable for Smartphone | SC13 TRS to TRS Cable
